scripts.test:e2e: npm run bddgen && npm run clean:allure && playwright test --project=bdd
scripts.test:e2e:headed: npm run bddgen && npm run clean:allure && playwright test --project=bdd --headed
scripts.test:e2e:ui: npm run bddgen && npm run clean:allure && playwright test --project=bdd --ui
scripts.allure:e2e: npm run test:e2e && npm run allure:open
scripts.allure:report: npm run allure:generate && allure open allure-report
